title: Trap Club Banger
summary: 140 BPM modern trap with rolling 808s, hi-hat triplets, dark anthemic synth lead.
prompt: A modern trap club instrumental at 140 BPM. Booming sub-808 with sliding pitches, snappy clap on 3, rapid-fire triplet hi-hats, dark minor-key synth lead with reverb, occasional vocal-chop hype shouts, ominous orchestral string stabs. Southern hip-hop production with cinematic depth and heavy low end. No vocals.
